# doris_query_asset

## Purpose

Run a SQL query against Apache Doris and emit the result as a Pandas DataFrame asset. Doris speaks the MySQL wire protocol; uses SQLAlchemy + PyMySQL under the hood.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name. |
| `query` | `str` | SQL query to execute. Returns the full result set as a DataFrame. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `host_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_FE_HOST"` | Env var with Doris FE host. |
| `database` | `str` | — | Doris database (catalog). |
| `username_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_USER"` | Env var with username. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | `"DORIS_PASSWORD"` | Env var with password. |
| `connection_string_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with a full SQLAlchemy URL (mysql+pymysql://user:pw@host:9030/db). Overrides the field-by-field host/port/database/username/password configuration. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"doris"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | Asset description. |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | Asset owners. |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | Catalog tags. |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | Asset kinds (auto-includes 'doris'). |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | — | Upstream Dagster asset keys. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `query_port` | `int` | `9030` | Doris MySQL-protocol query port. |
| `ssl` | `bool` | `false` | Connect via TLS. |
| `chunksize` | `int` | — | Optional pandas read_sql chunksize for streaming-large-result-set reads. Leave unset for full-materialize-in-memory (typical). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.DorisQueryAssetComponent
attributes:
  asset_name: doris_orders_recent
  query: |
    SELECT order_id, customer_id, total, order_date
      FROM analytics.orders
     WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  host_env_var: DORIS_FE_HOST
  query_port: 9030
  database: analytics
  username_env_var: DORIS_USER
  password_env_var: DORIS_PASSWORD
```
